title: veronica wormskjoldii subsp. nutans
intro: Veronica wormskjoldii subsp. nutans, also known as Swedish speedwell, is a perennial plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. Its health benefits include treating conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and mild digestive issues due to its ability to act as a diuretic and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties.
